zotero.abstractNote: We present Whisper-Flamingo, a novel architecture that integrates visual features into the Whisper model for audio-visual speech recognition (AVSR) and audio-visual speech translation (AVST). By leveraging the pre-trained Whisper model and a Flamingo-style cross-attention mechanism, our model effectively incorporates visual information to improve performance in challenging acoustic environments. We demonstrate that Whisper-Flamingo achieves state-of-the-art results on several benchmark datasets, showing significant improvements over audio-only and existing audio-visual models.
